---
name: Content Addition
about: Propose a new artifact definition, skill, reference file, checklist, or validator
title: '[CONTENT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Content Proposal

A clear description of the new content you are proposing.

---

## Content Type

- [ ] Artifact definition (`artifacts/`)
- [ ] Skill file (`skills/`)
- [ ] Reference layer file (`reference/`)
- [ ] Shared component / validator (`shared/`)
- [ ] Test case (`tests/`)
- [ ] Other: ___

---

## Proposed File Path

`[e.g. artifacts/planning-and-baselines/A09-quality-management-plan.md]`

---

## PMBOK 8 Anchor

What PMBOK 8 section or process does this content operationalize?

- Primary source: `[e.g. PMBOK8 Guide §2.9.2.1]`
- Supporting references: `[e.g. Forms-Book · BAP-2E]`

---

## Gap Being Filled

Which existing gap in the repository does this address? Reference `SKILL-REGISTRY.md` or `reference/README.md` planned items if applicable.

---

## Proposed Structure / Outline

Provide a rough outline of the content sections (not full content — that goes in the PR).

---

## Dependencies

List any existing files this content depends on or cross-references:

- Depends on: `[e.g. A08-scope-requirements-backlog.md]`
- Referenced by: `[e.g. SKL-03-01]`

---

## Checklist Before Submitting PR

- [ ] Content grounded in PMBOK 8 or labeled as `synthesis` / `organization-defined`
- [ ] Follows file naming convention
- [ ] SKILL-REGISTRY.md updated if adding a skill
- [ ] No duplication with existing content
